headline: Why Citi Sees a Potential Upside Opportunity in Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Despite Housing Headwinds
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding of 2.58%, The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is among the 7 Best Building Materials Stocks to Buy for the Residential Recovery. On June 3, Citi reinstated coverage of The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) with a Buy rating and a $355 price target. The firm views the current share price as an attractive entry opportunity […]
